default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into GrowthX partnership feedback with Homebase, discussing current priorities and opportunities for improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Homebase is focusing on payroll adoption and resources for new business starters](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [GrowthX partnership is strong on project management, but lacks visibility into AI workflow processes](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Opportunities for improvement: more collaborative workflow tweaking, proactive reporting, and zeitgeist-aware content insights](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)

## Topics

### Homebase Business Update

  - [ICP: Small businesses (20 employees or less) with hourly teams](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Product suite: Hiring software (with new AI tool), onboarding, scheduling, time tracking, and payroll](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [Current priorities:](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
      - [Increasing payroll adoption among existing customers](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
      - [Attracting payroll-first buyers](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [Developing resources for business starters (e.g., restaurant name generators, Starter Center)](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)

### GrowthX Partnership Feedback

  - [Strengths:](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [Strong project management and account handling (Jess)](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
      - [Reliable task completion (Becerra)](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Areas for improvement:](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [Lack of visibility into AI workflow processes](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Difficulty in collaborative problem-solving due to limited insight](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
      - [Content team seems disconnected from AI flows producing work](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)

### Content Strategy and Bottlenecks

  - [Challenge: Multiple feedback rounds on deliverables (e.g., TLDRs for blogs)](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Root cause: Potential misalignment in prompts, understanding of ICP, keyword intent](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Desired solution: More collaborative workflow tweaking, reducing communication layers and wait times](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)

### Reporting and Campaign Management

  - [Current state: Basic performance updates during calls](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [Desired state:](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
      - [More granular data analysis (e.g., page performance, keyword difficulty)](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
      - [Proactive planning for content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
      - [Shift from production focus to campaign and impact focus](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)

### Future Partnership Vision

  - [Continue focus on Glossary Programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)

  - [Create a system for regular zeitgeist updates and language tracking](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)

  - [New platform launch with improved visibility and workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a 1-hour strategy deep dive in July to recalibrate workflows and set future priorities](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Explore early access for Homebase to pilot new GrowthX platform features](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Investigate potential for building custom workflows to address Homebase's specific needs (e.g., content refresh identifier)](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [Set up a follow-up meeting to discuss Kerry's content refresh identifier concept](https://fathom.video/share/xGf9RRa2mL-BNWgPvATL3zX5enysZozm?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)

action_items.description: Develop more detailed reporting on content performance, including recommendations for future actions
Implement Reddit scraping for general topics as requested by Kerry; prepare weekly report format
Schedule 1-hour strategy recalibration deep dive with Kerry in July
Set up early access for Kerry to GrowthX platform; include pilot program for new features
